_comment:
Airspeed sensor zero / auto-calibration. Operator shields the pitot tube from wind and the autopilot zeroes the differential pressure reading. PX4 invokes the procedure directly; ArduPilot enables auto-cal on the next flight via `ARSPD_AUTOCAL`. Either way the recipe is fire-and-confirm — failures both route to `holdStill` (wind / vibration is the only operator-recoverable cause).

Overall budget is 60s — procedure itself is seconds; budget covers operator setup of the pitot shroud.

then.detail: Airspeed calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
